notableEvents.label: Matt Chapman plunked
notableEvents.detail: Matt Chapman hit by pitch. Jung Hoo Lee to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Luis Arraez grounds into a force out, first baseman Kyle Stowers to shortstop Otto Lopez. Jung Hoo Lee scores. Matt Chapman out at 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Otto Lopez.
